trends.title: Generative AI and Large Language Models
trends.description: Advanced AI systems like GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini that can generate human-like text, code, and creative content, transforming industries from customer service to software development.

trends.title: AI-Powered Automation and Copilots
trends.description: Integration of AI assistants into workflows (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Microsoft 365 Copilot) to automate tasks, enhance productivity, and provide real-time support across business and creative processes.

trends.title: Edge AI and IoT Convergence
trends.description: Deployment of AI algorithms directly on edge devices (sensors, cameras, smartphones) to enable real-time data processing, reduce latency, and improve privacy in smart cities, healthcare, and manufacturing.

trends.title: Quantum Computing Advancements
trends.description: Progress in quantum hardware and algorithms, with companies like IBM, Google, and startups achieving milestones in error correction and practical applications for cryptography, drug discovery, and optimization.

trends.title: Sustainable and Green Tech
trends.description: Innovations in renewable energy, carbon capture, circular economy tech, and AI-driven sustainability solutions to address climate change and reduce environmental impact across industries.
